chunks.text: EECS Network Outage | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar EECS Network Outage From some time late last night until about 11:30 this morning, much of the EECS network was down due to a major power failure in th

etwork was down due to a major power failure in the Soda Hall Network Center. Two circuit breakers feeding both the power distribution system and the A/C tripped causing the outage. IDSG staff responded to the outage as did a UCB electrician who wer

ded to the outage as did a UCB electrician who were able to restore power The electrician is investigating the cause but we don’t yet know what the cause was. Thanks to many EECS staff who helped during this outage to get things going again. Fred Arc

ng this outage to get things going again. Fred Archibald Resolved as of 2008-01-27 11:00:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at
ce Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
